5:2: In this verse, the Lord is resolving Arjunas confusion regarding the superiority of work in devotion over renunciation of work. Although both the path of sannyasa (renunciation material activities) and the path of karma-yoga (working in devotion) eventually lead the practitioner to the supreme destination, karma-yoga is superior.
